title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a new feature by Anthropic that enables users to create website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages using AI. The tool supports options for prototypes, slide decks, templates, and custom designs, allowing generation of fully functional UI, layouts, and components from prompts.
